---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**What you expected**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See the error

**Environment**
- LQGovernance version / commit:
- Deployment: self-hosted / local dev
- Browser (if a UI bug):
- AI enabled (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set): yes / no

**Logs or screenshots**
Include any relevant server logs or screenshots. Please redact real board data.
